name: academorix/attribution
purpose: Marketing attribution — AttributionTouchpoint append-only ledger and per-subject rolling Attribution profile across first-touch / last-touch / multi-touch models.
capabilities: UTM parameter capture at session start
Feeds reporting for CAC + ROAS dashboards
when_to_use: Assigning marketing credit for a signup or conversion across referring channels.
when_not_to_use: For raw product-usage events, use the sibling academorix/analytics package.
